input.command:
cat > /tmp/verify_new_base.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Verifying new Base logo sources..."
echo ""

echo "DeFi Llama Base logo:"
curl -sI "https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_base.jpg" | grep -E "HTTP|content-type" | head -2

echo ""
echo "Checking other chains on DeFi Llama:"
for chain in ethereum optimism arbitrum polygon; do
  echo -n "  $chain: "
  curl -sI "https://icons.llamao.fi/icons/chains/rsz_${chain}.jpg" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}'
done

EOF

chmod +x /tmp/verify_new_base.sh
/tmp/verify_new_base.sh

state.output:

content-type: image/webp

  ethereum: 200
  optimism: 200
  arbitrum: 200
  polygon: 200
